text:
{
  "title":"Financial Statement Questions",
   "description":"Comprehensive Financial Statement questions for accounting students, CPA trainees, or finance learners.",
   "timeLimit":60,
   "passingScore":70,
   "sections":[
      {
         "name":"A",
         "title":"Financial Statement Preparation",
         "description":"Prepare financial statements based on given data.",
         "passage":"Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd as at 31 December 2025",
         "questions":[
            {
               "questionNumber":1,
               "text":"Preparation of Income Statement and Statement of Financial Position",
               "type":"financial-spreadsheet",
               "points":20,
               "subQuestions":[
                  {
                     "label":"a)",
                     "text":"Prepare the Income Statement for the year ended 31 December 2025.",
                     "type":"financial-spreadsheet",
                     "points":10,
                     "spreadsheetTemplate":{
                        "headers":["Particulars", "RWF"],
                        "data":[
                           ["Sales Revenue", ""],
                           ["Cost of Goods Sold", ""],
                           ["Gross Profit", ""],
                           ["Salaries Expense", ""],
                           ["Rent Expense", ""],
                           ["Depreciation", ""],
                           ["Net Profit", ""]
                        ]
                     },
                     "spreadsheetModelAnswer":{
                        "headers":["Particulars", "RWF"],
                        "data":[
                           ["Sales Revenue", "20,000,000"],
                           ["Cost of Goods Sold", "9,000,000"],
                           ["Gross Profit", "11,000,000"],
                           ["Salaries Expense", "2,500,000"],
                           ["Rent Expense", "1,000,000"],
                           ["Depreciation", "1,200,000"],
                           ["Net Profit", "6,300,000"]
                        ]
                     },
                     "correctAnswer":"See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
                  },
                  {
                     "label":"b)",
                     "text":"Prepare the Statement of Financial Position as at 31 December 2025.",
                     "type":"financial-spreadsheet",
                     "points":10,
                     "spreadsheetTemplate":{
                        "headers":["Particulars", "RWF"],
                        "data":[
                           ["Cash", ""],
                           ["Accounts Receivable", ""],
                           ["Inventory", ""],
                           ["Equipment", ""],
                           ["Accumulated Depreciation", ""],
                           ["Total Assets", ""],
                           ["Share Capital", ""],
                           ["Retained Earnings", ""],
                           ["Accounts Payable", ""],
                           ["Outstanding Salaries", ""],
                           ["Total Equity and Liabilities", ""]
                        ]
                     },
                     "spreadsheetModelAnswer":{
                        "headers":["Particulars", "RWF"],
                        "data":[
                           ["Cash", "5,000,000"],
                           ["Accounts Receivable", "3,000,000"],
                           ["Inventory", "5,000,000"],
                           ["Equipment", "12,000,000"],
                           ["Accumulated Depreciation", "3,200,000"],
                           ["Total Assets", "21,800,000"],
                           ["Share Capital", "15,000,000"],
                           ["Retained Earnings", "6,300,000"],
                           ["Accounts Payable", "2,500,000"],
                           ["Outstanding Salaries", "500,000"],
                           ["Total Equity and Liabilities", "24,300,000"]
                        ]
                     },
                     "correctAnswer":"See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
                  }
               ],
               "correctAnswer":"See subQuestions"
            },
            {
               "questionNumber":2,
               "text":"Financial Statement Analysis",
               "type":"open-ended",
               "points":20,
               "subQuestions":[
                  {
                     "label":"1.",
                     "text":"Calculate the Current Ratio for 2025.",
                     "type":"open-ended",
                     "points":4,
                     "correctAnswer":"2:1"
                  },
                  {
                     "label":"2.",
                     "text":"Calculate the Net Profit Margin for 2025.",
                     "type":"open-ended",
                     "points":4,
                     "correctAnswer":"12%"
                  },
                  {
                     "label":"3.",
                     "text":"Calculate the Return on Assets (ROA) for 2025.",
                     "type":"open-ended",
                     "points":4,
                     "correctAnswer":"24%"
                  },
                  {
                     "label":"4.",
                     "text":"Calculate the Debt Ratio for 2025.",
                     "type":"open-ended",
                     "points":4,
                     "correctAnswer":"40%"
                  },
                  {
                     "label":"5.",
                     "text":"Calculate the Percentage Increase in Sales from 2024 to 2025.",
                     "type":"open-ended",
                     "points":4,
                     "correctAnswer":"20%"
                  }
               ],
               "correctAnswer":"See subQuestions"
            }
         ]
      }
   ]
}

parsedContent.title: Financial Statement Questions
parsedContent.description: Comprehensive Financial Statement questions for accounting students, CPA trainees, or finance learners.

sections.name: A
sections.title: Financial Statement Preparation
sections.description: Prepare financial statements based on given data.
sections.passage: Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd as at 31 December 2025

questions.text: Preparation of Income Statement and Statement of Financial Position

subQuestions.label: a)
subQuestions.text: Prepare the Income Statement for the year ended 31 December 2025.

subQuestions.label: b)
subQuestions.text: Prepare the Statement of Financial Position as at 31 December 2025.
Calculate the Net Profit Margin for 2025.
Calculate the Return on Assets (ROA) for 2025.
Calculate the Percentage Increase in Sales from 2024 to 2025.
